name: mattermost
description: Mattermost platform — send and receive messages via Mattermost REST API

config_schema.label: Mattermost Server URL
config_schema.description: Base URL of the Mattermost server. Pre-configured via MATTERMOST_SERVER_URL env var.

config_schema.label: Personal Access Token
config_schema.description: Mattermost personal access token for the bot account. Pre-configured via MATTERMOST_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.

config_schema.label: Enable inbound polling
config_schema.description: Poll Mattermost for incoming messages (only used in polling mode)

config_schema.label: Polling interval (seconds)
config_schema.description: How often to poll for new messages (only used in polling mode)

config_schema.label: Channel IDs to watch
config_schema.description: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to watch for inbound messages

config_schema.label: Bot Username
config_schema.description: Username of the Mattermost bot account

config_schema.label: Connection Mode
config_schema.description: How to detect new messages: 'polling' or 'websocket' (real-time)
